summary: Python script is well-structured (type hints, error handling, TDD-commented rounds) but deliverable is critically incomplete: (1) fixture files (fixtures/package.json, requirements.txt, mock_licenses.json, config.json) not provided; (2) act-result.txt artifact MUST exist per requirements — missing; (3) no evidence of actionlint validation or act execution; (4) workflow references test_license_checker.py but tests not shown (unclear if completed); (5) --db flag hardcoded default may fail in execution. Workflow uses pinned actions and least-privilege permissions, but can't be validated. Script would fail immediately if run via act due to missing fixtures.
